entities.name: Day 3: Core + Cardio + Mobility
entities.context: Third day of a structured workout program combining core exercises, cardiovascular training, and mobility work

entities.name: Zone 2 Cardio
entities.context: Low-intensity steady-state cardio performed at aerobic heart rate zone 2 for 20-25 minutes

entities.name: Fartlek Training
entities.context: Unstructured interval-style cardio alternating between faster and slower paces

entities.name: Interval Training
entities.context: Structured cardio with 30-sec fast bursts and 90-sec recovery periods, 6-8 rounds

entities.name: Circuit Training
entities.context: 1-3 rounds of sequential core exercises performed as a circuit

entities.name: Dead Bugs
entities.context: Used in both warm-up activation (1x10) and main circuit (3x10 per side) for core stability

entities.name: Plank Variations
entities.context: Front and side planks, 30 sec each side, 3x60 sec total

entities.name: Russian Twists
entities.context: Rotational core exercise using 5-15lb medicine ball, 3x40 total twists

entities.name: Hanging Knee/Leg Raises
entities.context: Core exercise with lying knee raise regression option, 3x10 reps

entities.name: Mountain Climbers
entities.context: Dynamic core and cardio exercise, 3x30 seconds

entities.name: Medicine Ball Slams
entities.context: Explosive core and conditioning exercise, 3x15 reps

entities.name: Medicine Ball
entities.context: Equipment used for Russian Twists (5-15 lbs) and Medicine Ball Slams

entities.name: Jump Rope
entities.context: Used in conditioning finisher, 50 skips per round

entities.name: Meditation
entities.context: 5-minute session at end of workout for recovery and mindfulness

entities.name: Mobility Work
entities.context: Cool-down stretching focused on hip flexors, hamstrings, glutes, upper traps, and lats

entities.name: Activation Sequence
entities.context: Pre-workout warm-up pattern using glute bridges, dead bugs, and bird dogs to prime muscles

relationships.context: Main core work structured as 1-3 round circuit of 7 exercises
One of three cardio options for the 20-30 minute cardio block
Second cardio option with structured 30:90 work-rest intervals
Third cardio option for unstructured pace variation
5-minute closing meditation as final workout component
5-10 minute cool-down stretching targeting key muscle groups
Warm-up phase using three activation exercises before main work
Exercise 7 in core circuit, 3x10 per side
Explosive slam exercise using medicine ball
